sentences.t: みんなおいしいもの食べるの好きだよね。
sentences.en: Everyone likes to eat well.
sentences.r: Minna oishii mono taberu no suki da yo ne.

sentences.t: いいお店知ってるよ。
sentences.en: I know a good spot to eat.
sentences.r: Ii omise shitteru yo.

sentences.t: 君に一個買ってあげるね。
sentences.en: I'm going to buy one for you.
sentences.r: Kimi ni ikko katte ageru ne.

sentences.t: 電車は六時発だよ。
sentences.en: The train leaves at six.
sentences.r: Densha wa roku-ji hatsu da yo.

sentences.t: 九時から五時までだよ。
sentences.en: From nine until five.
sentences.r: Ku-ji kara go-ji made da yo.

sentences.t: ホテルは街の近くだよ。
sentences.en: The hotel is near downtown.
sentences.r: Hoteru wa machi no chikaku da yo.

sentences.t: これ終わらせるにはもっと時間がいるな。
sentences.en: We need more time to finish this.
sentences.r: Kore owaraseru ni wa motto jikan ga iru na.

sentences.t: 彼らこの街が大好きなんだ。
sentences.en: They love this city.
sentences.r: Karera kono machi ga daisuki na n da.

sentences.t: ちょっとスマホ借りていい？
sentences.en: Can I use your phone for a second?
sentences.r: Chotto sumaho karite ii?

sentences.t: 旅行するのすごく好きなんだ。
sentences.en: We really like to travel.
sentences.r: Ryokō suru no sugoku suki na n da.

sentences.t: マルコは辞書で筋トレするんだ。
sentences.en: Marco works out with a dictionary.
sentences.r: Maruko wa jisho de kintore suru n da.

sentences.t: 仕事でなにあったか教えて。
sentences.en: Tell me what happened at work.
sentences.r: Shigoto de nani atta ka oshiete.

sentences.t: それいつ言うつもりだったの？
sentences.en: When were you going to tell me that?
sentences.r: Sore itsu iu tsumori datta no?

sentences.t: ドアのそばにいるよ。
sentences.en: I'm next to the door.
sentences.r: Doa no soba ni iru yo.

sentences.t: 日曜はいつも家にいるよ。
sentences.en: I'm always home on Sundays.
sentences.r: Nichiyō wa itsumo ie ni iru yo.

sentences.t: 運転手さんも場所わからないんだ。
sentences.en: The taxi driver doesn't know where it is.
sentences.r: Untenshu-san mo basho wakaranai n da.

sentences.t: もっと広い家探してるんだ。
sentences.en: We're looking for a bigger house.
sentences.r: Motto hiroi ie sagashiteru n da.

sentences.t: もっと料理上手くなりたいな。
sentences.en: I'd love to learn to cook better.
sentences.r: Motto ryōri umaku naritai na.

sentences.t: 君んち寄るね。
sentences.en: I'm going to swing by your place.
sentences.r: Kimi n chi yoru ne.

sentences.t: 今日は行けそうにないんだ。
sentences.en: I won't be able to go today.
sentences.r: Kyō wa ikesō ni nai n da.

sentences.t: 聞いたのに返事してくれなかったんだ。
sentences.en: I asked him and he didn't answer me.
sentences.r: Kiita no ni henji shite kurenakatta n da.

sentences.t: 一つ言うとね、君が正しかったよ。
sentences.en: I'll tell you one thing: you were right.
sentences.r: Hitotsu iu to ne, kimi ga tadashikatta yo.

sentences.t: なんでスペイン語勉強してるのってよく聞かれるんだ。
sentences.en: People ask me why I study Spanish.
sentences.r: Nande Supein-go benkyō shiteru no tte yoku kikareru n da.

sentences.t: 彼女、自分の気持ちぜんぜん話さないんだ。
sentences.en: She never talks about how she feels.
sentences.r: Kanojo, jibun no kimochi zenzen hanasanai n da.

sentences.t: いいお店見つけたよ。
sentences.en: We found a good place to eat.
sentences.r: Ii omise mitsuketa yo.

sentences.t: そこから画面見える？
sentences.en: Can you see the screen from there?
sentences.r: Soko kara gamen mieru?

sentences.t: 朝はコーヒー飲むんだ。
sentences.en: I drink coffee in the morning.
sentences.r: Asa wa kōhī nomu n da.

sentences.t: なにかもう一品シェアする？
sentences.en: Do you want to order something else to share?
sentences.r: Nanika mō ippin shea suru?

sentences.t: 君がいないと家ががらんとしてるよ。
sentences.en: The house feels empty without you.
sentences.r: Kimi ga inai to ie ga garan to shiteru yo.

sentences.t: 授業は九時からだよ。
sentences.en: The class is at nine.
sentences.r: Jugyō wa ku-ji kara da yo.

sentences.t: 微妙なものに高いお金払っちゃった。
sentences.en: I paid a lot for something really bad.
sentences.r: Bimyō na mono ni takai okane harratchatta.

sentences.t: 明日までお金貸してくれる？
sentences.en: Can you lend me money until tomorrow?
sentences.r: Ashita made okane kashite kureru?

sentences.t: チケットは駅で買ってね。
sentences.en: Buy the ticket at the station.
sentences.r: Chiketto wa eki de katte ne.

sentences.t: マドリード行きの電車もう出ちゃったよ。
sentences.en: The train to Madrid already left.
sentences.r: Madorīdo-yuki no densha mō dechatta yo.

sentences.t: 目を見て言ってよ。
sentences.en: Look me in the eyes and say it.
sentences.r: Me o mite itte yo.

sentences.t: マルコに単語いくつ知ってるか教えて。
sentences.en: Tell Marco how many words you know.
sentences.r: Maruko ni tango ikutsu shitteru ka oshiete.

sentences.t: 鍵はお隣さんに渡したよ。
sentences.en: We gave the keys to the neighbor.
sentences.r: Kagi wa otonari-san ni watashita yo.

sentences.t: 先週すごく忙しかったんだ。
sentences.en: Last week I was really busy.
sentences.r: Senshū sugoku isogashikatta n da.

sentences.t: 今日はなにもしなくていいんだ。
sentences.en: I don't have to do anything today.
sentences.r: Kyō wa nani mo shinakute ii n da.

sentences.t: 全部一人でやらなくていいんだよ。
sentences.en: You don't have to do everything alone.
sentences.r: Zenbu hitori de yaranakute ii n da yo.

sentences.t: 帰ろう、もう遅いよ。
sentences.en: Let's go home, it's already late.
sentences.r: Kaerō, mō osoi yo.

sentences.t: 今日は仕事したくない、寝たい。
sentences.en: Today I don't want to work, I want to sleep.
sentences.r: Kyō wa shigoto shitakunai, netai.

sentences.t: もう良くなってきた気がする。
sentences.en: I think I feel better already.
sentences.r: Mō yoku natte kita ki ga suru.

sentences.t: もうちょっとだけほしいな。
sentences.en: I want a little more, please.
sentences.r: Mō chotto dake hoshii na.

sentences.t: お医者さんは大丈夫だって。
sentences.en: The doctor says I'm fine.
sentences.r: Oisha-san wa daijōbu datte.

sentences.t: 私の話し方なんてだれが決めるの？
sentences.en: Who says how I have to talk?
sentences.r: Watashi no hanashikata nante dare ga kimeru no?

sentences.t: コーヒーお願いします。
sentences.en: I'd like a coffee, please.
sentences.r: Kōhī onegai shimasu.

sentences.t: 久しぶりだね。
sentences.en: I haven't seen you in a while.
sentences.r: Hisashiburi da ne.

sentences.t: スペイン語二年勉強してるんだ。
sentences.en: I've been studying Spanish for two years.
sentences.r: Supein-go ni-nen benkyō shiteru n da.

sentences.t: 君と一緒に行けてすごくうれしかったよ。
sentences.en: I was really happy because I went with you.
sentences.r: Kimi to issho ni ikete sugoku ureshikatta yo.

sentences.t: 二名でお願いします。
sentences.en: A table for two, please.
sentences.r: Ni-mei de onegai shimasu.

sentences.t: うん、このバス街に行くよ。
sentences.en: Yes, this bus goes downtown.
sentences.r: Un, kono basu machi ni iku yo.

sentences.t: 今日は昨日より暑いね。
sentences.en: Today it's hotter than yesterday.
sentences.r: Kyō wa kinō yori atsui ne.

sentences.t: 今何時かわかんない、ごめん。
sentences.en: I don't know what time it is, sorry.
sentences.r: Ima nan-ji ka wakannai, gomen.

sentences.t: ここで止めてください。
sentences.en: Stop the taxi here, please.
sentences.r: Koko de tomete kudasai.

sentences.t: ご飯食べたあといつも眠くなるんだ。
sentences.en: After eating, I always want to sleep.
sentences.r: Gohan tabeta ato itsumo nemuku naru n da.

sentences.t: 明日また来なきゃだめだね。
sentences.en: We're going to have to come back tomorrow.
sentences.r: Ashita mata konakya dame da ne.

sentences.t: 今日は昨日より時間ないんだ。
sentences.en: Today I have less time than yesterday.
sentences.r: Kyō wa kinō yori jikan nai n da.

sentences.t: ご飯すごくおいしいよ、ありがとう。
sentences.en: The food is really good, thanks.
sentences.r: Gohan sugoku oishii yo, arigatō.

sentences.t: 歩きなよ、すぐ近くだよ。
sentences.en: Walk, it's very close.
sentences.r: Aruki na yo, sugu chikaku da yo.

sentences.t: 近いよ、歩いて二分。
sentences.en: It's close, two minutes on foot.
sentences.r: Chikai yo, aruite ni-fun.

sentences.t: バスで行きなよ、そのほうが早いよ。
sentences.en: Go by bus, it's faster.
sentences.r: Basu de iki na yo, sono hō ga hayai yo.

sentences.t: 毎日練習しなきゃね。
sentences.en: You have to practice every day.
sentences.r: Mainichi renshū shinakya ne.

sentences.t: ここ気に入った、また来たいな。
sentences.en: I like this place; I want to come back.
sentences.r: Koko ki ni itta, mata kitai na.

sentences.t: 君より先に着くよ。
sentences.en: I'm going to get there before you.
sentences.r: Kimi yori saki ni tsuku yo.

sentences.t: 君が言ったから行ったんだよ。
sentences.en: I went because you told me to.
sentences.r: Kimi ga itta kara itta n da yo.

sentences.t: 今日は忙しくないよ、暇だよ。
sentences.en: Today I'm not busy, I'm free.
sentences.r: Kyō wa isogashikunai yo, hima da yo.

sentences.t: 君があの人知ってるの知ってるよ。
sentences.en: I know that you know that person.
sentences.r: Kimi ga ano hito shitteru no shitteru yo.

sentences.t: これは根気がいるよ。
sentences.en: You have to be patient with this.
sentences.r: Kore wa konki ga iru yo.

sentences.t: 道間違えてる気がする。
sentences.en: I think we're going the wrong way.
sentences.r: Michi machigaeteru ki ga suru.

sentences.t: ううん、そのバスはそこ行かないよ。
sentences.en: No, that bus doesn't go there.
sentences.r: Uun, sono basu wa soko ikanai yo.

sentences.t: 時間なかったから行かなかったんだ。
sentences.en: I didn't go because I didn't have time.
sentences.r: Jikan nakatta kara ikanakatta n da.

sentences.t: 話す前にちょっと考えたほうがいいよ。
sentences.en: You should think before you speak.
sentences.r: Hanasu mae ni chotto kangaeta hō ga ii yo.

sentences.t: お母さんに電話しなきゃ。
sentences.en: I have to call my mom.
sentences.r: Okāsan ni denwa shinakya.

sentences.t: お母さんに電話しなきゃだめだよ。
sentences.en: You have to call your mom.
sentences.r: Okāsan ni denwa shinakya dame da yo.

sentences.t: できることをやればいいよ。
sentences.en: You do what you can.
sentences.r: Dekiru koto o yareba ii yo.

sentences.t: シャワー浴びて、着替えて、出かけるよ。
sentences.en: I shower, get dressed, and head out.
sentences.r: Shawā abite, kigaete, dekakeru yo.

sentences.t: お会計お願いします。
sentences.en: Can you bring us the check, please?
sentences.r: Okaikei onegai shimasu.

sentences.t: 広場を過ぎたらすぐだよ。
sentences.en: After the square, it's close.
sentences.r: Hiroba o sugitara sugu da yo.

sentences.t: 怒ってるんじゃなくて、ただ疲れてるだけ。
sentences.en: I'm not angry, I'm just tired.
sentences.r: Okotteru n ja nakute, tada tsukareteru dake.

sentences.t: チョコ好きだよね？
sentences.en: You really like chocolate, don't you?
sentences.r: Choko suki da yo ne?

sentences.t: やっとくよ、心配しないで。
sentences.en: I'll do it, don't worry.
sentences.r: Yattoku yo, shinpai shinaide.

sentences.t: 高くないよ、安心して。
sentences.en: It's not expensive, don't worry.
sentences.r: Takakunai yo, anshin shite.

sentences.t: なにするって言ってたっけ？
sentences.en: What did you say you were going to do?
sentences.r: Nani suru tte itteta kke?

sentences.t: 歩かないほうがいいよ、遠いから。
sentences.en: Don't walk, it's far.
sentences.r: Arukanai hō ga ii yo, tōi kara.

sentences.t: すみません、この電車マドリード行きますか？
sentences.en: Excuse me, does the train go to Madrid?
sentences.r: Sumimasen, kono densha Madorīdo ikimasu ka?

sentences.t: スーツケースあるからタクシー乗るよ。
sentences.en: I'm taking a taxi because I have suitcases.
sentences.r: Sūtsukēsu aru kara takushī noru yo.

sentences.t: 子供のころ勉強嫌いだったんだ。
sentences.en: As a kid, I didn't like studying.
sentences.r: Kodomo no koro benkyō kirai datta n da.

sentences.t: そんなに難しくないと思うよ。
sentences.en: I don't think it's that hard.
sentences.r: Sonna ni muzukashikunai to omou yo.

sentences.t: こちらアナ、私の友達なんだ。
sentences.en: This is Ana, a friend of mine.
sentences.r: Kochira Ana, watashi no tomodachi na n da.

sentences.t: はじめまして、お名前は？
sentences.en: Nice to meet you, what's your name?
sentences.r: Hajimemashite, onamae wa?

sentences.t: 走るの苦手で、歩くほうが好きなんだ。
sentences.en: I don't like running; I prefer walking.
sentences.r: Hashiru no nigate de, aruku hō ga suki na n da.

sentences.t: うちに来てほしいんだ。
sentences.en: I want you to come to my house.
sentences.r: Uchi ni kite hoshii n da.
